channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: SpaceX IPO raises total of $85.7 billion as underwriters exercise 'greenshoe' overallotment option
item.description: Elon Musk's space and artificial intelligence company raised an initial $75 billion on Thursday.

item.title: Trump is giving Warsh room to reshape the Fed
item.description: The new Fed chair is on a political honeymoon with a U.S. president who has been the Fed's biggest opponent.

item.title: Vance says 'a lot' of Iran deal details to figure out, but U.S. has 'all the cards'
item.description: Vance on CNBC's "Squawk Box" expressed confidence that America has "all the cards" in subsequent talks with Iran.

item.title: Dow jumps 700 points to record with rally gaining steam after Trump signs Iran deal memorandum: Live updates
item.description: The three major indexes are coming off a winning week.

item.title: 'Mag 7' is no more, meet the 'FAB 10': Retail investors buy SpaceX in record numbers for their new portfolio plan
item.description: Single-stock retail buying was $117 million for SpaceX on its first day of trading, amounting to 56% of all retail purchases, Vanda Research found.

item.title: Evercore ISI says landmark SpaceX IPO could reignite bull market, send S&P 500 to 9,000
item.description: Strategist Julian Emanuel likened the early enthusiasm around SpaceX to the Netscape IPO of 1995 that ushered in a period of optimism around the internet.

item.title: Fox to buy streaming device maker Roku for $22 billion
item.description: Fox, the owner of the news and sports networks, said it has reached a deal to acquire Roku for about $22 billion in enterprise value.

item.title: Anthropic to meet with Trump administration over Mythos dispute
item.description: Anthropic received an export control directive that ordered the company to suspend access to its latest AI models by any foreign national.

item.title: Oil tumbles on US-Iran deal framework: How one trader is playing the move
item.description: Airline stocks are rallying Monday and the U.S. Global Jets ETF (JETS) is on the verge of a new high for the year.

item.title: U.S.-Iran deal explained: What we know — and what remains unresolved
item.description: Stocks rose after a preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement, but questions remain over Hormuz, Israel and what follows a potential signing in Geneva.

item.title: Warsh's Fed is likely to hold rates steady — what the leadership change could mean for your money
item.description: The Federal Reserve's June meeting, the first helmed by new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh, may impact many consumer borrowing and savings rates down the road.

item.title: Sen. Warren asks Trump if administration plans to raise Social Security retirement age
item.description: In a new letter to President Donald Trump, Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., asks what the administration's plans are for Social Security reform.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: SpaceX, Roku, Tripadvisor, Ferrari & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.

item.title: Dick's Sporting Goods expanding Lids shops to 100 locations
item.description: Dick's Sporting Goods announced a partnership to bring Lids shops to 100 Dick's stores.

item.title: Vance says U.S. expects Strait of Hormuz to be open 'toll free' long term
item.description: The U.S. and Iran have issued conflicting statements on how the Strait of Hormuz will be managed.

item.title: SpaceX continues to rise after record IPO. Jay Woods says watch these levels
item.description: SpaceX's Friday debut marked biggest initial public offering in history.

item.title: Ron Baron bought $1 billion of SpaceX shares in IPO, lifting stake to $25 billion
item.description: "I think we're gonna make hundreds of billions of dollars," Baron said Monday on CNBC's "Squawk Box."

item.title: Electronic Arts launches EA Advertising, a new way for brands to advertise 'directly into gameplay'
item.description: Electronic Arts announced EA Advertising, a new way for brands to connect with fans through its portfolio of games, from stadium signs to custom content.

item.title: U.S. crude drops below $80 for the first time since March as Iran deal is set to open Hormuz Strait
item.description: "The Deal with the Islamic Republic of Iran is now complete," Trump said in a Truth Social post.

item.title: SpaceX doesn't have a timeline for its human missions to Mars. Kalshi traders say don't expect it this decade
item.description: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi see only an 18% chance the Elon Musk-led company gets to Earth's neighbor by 2030.

item.title: We're adding to our position in a consumer bank that benefits from lower oil prices
item.description: Concerns about consumer credit have weighed on this stock since the Iran war began.

item.title: The best annuity companies of 2026
item.description: We picked the top annuities providers based on rates, fees, investment options and more.

item.title: KFC leans into boneless chicken, new drinks as chain tries to regain market share
item.description: KFC is facing more competition from legacy giants and upstarts alike, thanks to the growing global popularity of chicken.

item.title: Salesforce to buy AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion to boost agentic offerings
item.description: Businesses are accelerating their agentic offerings for enterprises as competition heats up.

item.title: Charlie Javice reportedly seeking a pardon from Trump
item.description: Javice founded a startup called Frank that JPMorgan acquired in 2021 for $175 million.

item.title: Trump says France must scrap tech 'sales tax' or face 100% wine tariffs: NY Post
item.description: President Donald Trump issued the threat ahead of this week's G7 summit in Évian-les-Bains, France.

item.title: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.

item.title: Treasury yields slide as Iran deal drives rethink on Fed interest rate hikes
item.description: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — fell almost 3 basis points to 4.457%.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic to return to normal as soon as August, Kalshi traders speculate
item.description: Odds that the Strait of Hormuz traffic will return to normal before August surpassed 50%, following U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement.

item.title: SpaceX IPO shines a light on the product set to disrupt Wall Street
item.description: Perp market traders had a form of early access to SpaceX, and the trading closely aligned with later prices in the stock market.
